examples: The room had been carpeted and the windows glazed with coloured glass.
High-temperature stonewares were being made with glazed surfaces.
The windows were small, glazed with little diamond-shaped panes, and they opened outward, on hinges, like doors.
You girls glazed over at preliminary comments about our professional accomplishments and the importance of networking.
Everyone wants their wings perfectly glazed but you only get perfect glazing with lots of sugar.
